title: ‘Green Budget’: Amid LPG Crunch, CM Rekha Gupta Announces Free Cylinder For Delhi Households On Holi and Diwali
description: Chief Minister Gupta, who oversees the finance portfolio, introduced a landmark ₹1,03,700 crore budget for the National Capital Territory. Characterizing the plan as a "green budget," she noted that it is designed to steer the region through a significant period of economic shift.
